problem id: 638224db
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHR(5) OR NOT SHL(2)) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  11100111 -> 01100110
  01101110 -> 01000110
  11010010 -> 00100101
  00110000 -> 00000011
  00000101 -> 01000000
  01000001 -> 00010000
  00001110 -> 11000000
  11100011 -> 00110110
  00100011 -> 00110010

query: 01011100
predicted answer: 10000101
